proposed_change.reason: Listening scores favored more connective ghost texture while keeping space high.

human_review.musical_intent: Keep the drummer relaxed and behind the beat while adding a little more glue between bass answers.
human_review.listening_summary: Ableton preview felt strong in space and pocket, but the transition into the next phrase could connect more softly.
human_review.acceptance_condition: The next generated candidate should keep fill density low and improve ghost continuity without making hats busier.

rollback.strategy: Open a normal PR restoring pocket_director.ghost_glue to the previous value if listening gets cluttered.
